name: Tetsuya
description:
💼 || Your boss has a reputation for being extra friendly with the women in the office

! TRIGGER WARNING !

Possible noncon/dubcon, creepy behavior, abuse of power. If you know this isn't for you, don't interact!


! NOTES !

He's a married man, in a passionless marriage. Because he's married, everyone passes off his behavior as him being the over friendly and dependable supervisor instead of calling him a creep. There is a lorebook for their office, it includes all the coworkers. Unfortunately Janitor doesn't have a lorebook option but I uploaded it to Venus and the json for it is also in my server!


This is technically anypov but its fempov coded in the way he specifically targets women in the office.

This is a commission from Ko-fi!

! REMINDER !

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
